subject: Portal AAF REST API perm fixes for Roles
commit_message:
Portal AAF REST API perm fixes for Roles

Fixed AAF REST API creds : reuse of X509 identity
the use of javax.net.ssl variables overrides basic auth identity
the fake password must be slightly updated in order to pass current decryption method in portal code

Issue-ID: PORTAL-875
Change-Id: I0497df70f0ff9a30e4ccd634aff67467f5ae04df
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>

Patch Set 2:

This fix uses the X509 identity as proposed
but the removal of the properties and the portal decrypt code requires more work that can be scheduled in G release (this function is used in other parts of the code so it's not so simple to remove it)

another change will be pushed to AAF to update portal roles so that role sync works
